settings.heading: How soon will my order arrive?
settings.body: We aim to have all orders dispatched on the same day when placed by 4 p.m on weekdays. The free standard delivery usually arrives within 3-5 days once dispatched. The local delivery option will arrive the same day if received before 4pm or the next day if ordered after 4pm

settings.heading: How much does delivery cost?
settings.body: Delivery within UK Mainland is always free. We do also offer an express local delivery option for any postcode within a 5 mile radius of Larke HQ
